roles.name: Royal Architect of the Sacred Realm
roles.description: Designs the grand architecture of the kingdom's systems — keeper of the Triforce blueprint.

roles.name: Captain of the Royal Guard
roles.description: Marshals the knights of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the Princess.

roles.name: Keeper of the Royal Records
roles.description: Steward of scrolls, layouts, fields and permission sets within the castle vaults.

roles.name: Master Smith of Goron City
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform craft at the volcanic anvils of Death Mountain.

roles.name: Royal Smith of the Master Sword
roles.description: Senior craftsman who reforges and tempers the most sacred Salesforce code.

roles.name: Knight Commander of Hyrule
roles.description: Leads all Hylian Salesforce craft — sets the standards and trains the senior knights.

roles.name: Sheikah Ranger of Kakariko
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced shadow-craft.

roles.name: Sheikah Scout of the Plateau
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Ranger's eye.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Sheikah Slate
roles.description: Newest recruit to the Sheikah order — learns the Slate's runes step by step.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of Eldin
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Hyrule's systems and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of Eldin
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Divine Beasts
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the ancient Sheikah patterns.

roles.name: Healer of the Great Fairy Fountain
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds the maladies before they reach the Princess.

roles.name: Royal Herald of Hyrule
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Trumpeter of Castle Town
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call for festivals and proclamations.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the Royal Family
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Court Scribe of Hyrule Castle
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the royal craft of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Hyrule Castle Town — Royal Stewardship CRM Rollout
Kakariko Village — Sheikah Slate Analytics Build
Kokiri Forest & Zora's Domain — Wildwater Analytics Implementation

hyrule-castle-town.themedRole: Royal Architect of the Sacred Realm
Royal Architect of the Sacred Realm

kakariko-village-sheikah.themedRole: Royal Smith of the Master Sword

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.themedRole: Royal Architect of the Sacred Realm
Healer of the Great Fairy Fountain

hyrule-castle-town.name: Light the Sanctum Lanterns
hyrule-castle-town.description: Discovery sign-off — lanterns lit from the Sanctum to Castle Town.

hyrule-castle-town.name: Reforging the Master Sword
hyrule-castle-town.description: Build kickoff: the Princess's blade reforged at the pedestal.

hyrule-castle-town.name: Audience at the Throne Room
hyrule-castle-town.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review with King Daphnes's council.

hyrule-castle-town.name: Calamity Diversion at Hyrule Field
hyrule-castle-town.description: Phase invoice trigger: feint at the Calamity to draw the eye.

hyrule-castle-town.name: Coronation of Princess Zelda
hyrule-castle-town.description: Go-Live: the crown returns to Hyrule Castle.

hyrule-castle-town.name: Royal Hand-off to Impa
hyrule-castle-town.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Impa.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Awakening at the Shrine of Resurrection
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: Project kickoff: the Slate awakens in Kakariko.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Climb the Great Plateau Tower
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: Build phase: Sheikah Towers brought online across the regions.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Hateno Lab Activation
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: UAT gate: Purah's lab brings the Slate's runes to life.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Divine Beast Vah Medoh Reclaimed
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: Go-Live: Sheikah analytics network broadcasting kingdom-wide.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Return to Kakariko
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: Hyper-care close: the village resumes its quiet watch.

kakariko-village-sheikah.name: Tribute to Elder Impa
kakariko-village-sheikah.description: Final invoice: the Sheikah elder's blessing on the work.

gerudo-desert.name: Council at Gerudo Town
gerudo-desert.description: Discovery: the chieftain receives the project charter.

gerudo-desert.name: Forge the Lightning Helms
gerudo-desert.description: Build: Thunderhelm prototypes forged at the bazaar smithy.

gerudo-desert.name: Audit by Lady Urbosa
gerudo-desert.description: Solution review with the Champion of the Gerudo.

gerudo-desert.name: Vah Naboris Activation
gerudo-desert.description: Go-Live: the Divine Beast walks the desert once more.

gerudo-desert.name: Sandstorm Subsides
gerudo-desert.description: Project close: the desert calms and the bazaar reopens.

gerudo-desert.name: Final Tribute to the Chieftain
gerudo-desert.description: Final invoice from the throne of Gerudo Town.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Council at the Great Deku Tree
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: Kickoff council in the Kokiri Grove.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Gaze into the Zora Falls
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: Discovery: reports modelled from the river's flow.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Weave the Aqueduct Reports
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: Build: dashboards woven from Zora silk and forest fibre.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Gift-Giving at Zora's Domain
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: UAT acceptance: Lady Mipha bestows gifts on each member.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Sailing into the Lost Woods
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: Go-Live + handoff: the Kokiri vanish into the trees, the Zora into the sea.

kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.name: Final Recompense from King Zora
kokiri-zora-hyrule-fields.description: Final invoice from the throne of Zora's Domain.

Princess Zelda.notes: Pilgrimage to the Spring of Wisdom — annual prayer.

Link.notes: Hyrule Field patrol — pre-arranged silent ride.

Impa.notes: Sheikah elder's quarterly meditation in Kakariko.

Sheik.notes: Harp practice retreat — songs of the Goddesses.

Robbie.notes: Akkala Tech Lab — ancient furnace ignition.

Mipha.notes: Healing waters retreat at Zora's Domain.

Tulin.notes: Rito Village family visit — flight festival.

Revali.notes: Solo flight training — Revali's Gale rehearsal.
